releaseNotes:
## What's Changed
* feat(audio): 添加Android音频源选择功能 by @a2heng in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/149
* Feat(monitor): 为桌面端添加了监听按钮 by @UsonTong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/146
* 更换许可证为 GPL-3.0 by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/152
* ref: 优化 UI by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/145
* docs: 添加爱发电徽章和更好的表述 [skip ci] by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/157
* ci: 更新 macOS 构建工作流 by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/158
* docs: add TG badge [skip ci] by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/160
* style: 优化 UI by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/162
* docs: 优化 HTML 结构 [skip ci] by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/164
* feat: 支持从镜像源更新 by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/165
* ui: 更好的设置页 by @WingChunWong in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/166
* fix(audio): 修复 Ulunas 降噪 OLA 增益补偿缺失导致的音量衰减问题 by @moumoum0 in https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/pull/170


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/compare/v1.1.5...v1.2.0
